name: gpu-fleet-monitor
title: GPU Fleet Monitor
description: Monitor GPU/CPU usage across SSH hosts. Connect via Ghostty, Cursor, or tmux.
author: kazzart

commands.name: gpu-fleet
commands.title: GPU Fleet
commands.description: Monitor GPU and CPU usage across all SSH hosts

commands.name: add-host
commands.title: Add Host
commands.description: Add a new SSH host from a connection string

commands.name: quick-connect
commands.title: Quick Connect Best GPU
commands.description: Connect to the best available free GPU host

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Which terminal to use for SSH connections

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor Application
preferences.description: Which editor to use for remote SSH connections

preferences.name: workPatterns
preferences.title: Work Host Patterns
preferences.description: Comma-separated glob patterns to classify hosts as work (e.g. gpu-*, ml-server-*). Leave empty to use identity file matching.

preferences.name: personalPatterns
preferences.title: Personal Host Patterns
preferences.description: Comma-separated glob patterns to classify hosts as personal. Leave empty to use identity file matching.

preferences.name: workIdentityFiles
preferences.title: Work Identity Files
preferences.description: Comma-separated SSH identity file paths. Hosts using these keys are classified as work.

preferences.name: personalIdentityFiles
preferences.title: Personal Identity Files
preferences.description: Comma-separated SSH identity file paths. Hosts using these keys are classified as personal.

preferences.name: excludedHosts
preferences.title: Excluded Hosts
preferences.description: Comma-separated hostnames to exclude from the fleet list (github.com and * are always excluded).

preferences.name: defaultIdentityFile
preferences.title: Default Identity File for New Hosts
preferences.description: Identity file path to use when adding new hosts via the Add Host command. Leave empty to omit.

preferences.name: defaultView
preferences.title: Default View
preferences.description: Which hosts to show by default

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
preferences.description: How often to refresh host stats
